relations: Electricity's advent modernized society by making daily tasks easier and improving the standard of living
Electricity improved public health and safety through electric lighting, heating, and cooling systems, and advancements in medical technology
Electricity drove industrialization and economic growth by powering factories and manufacturing plants
Electricity's availability and use have driven advancements in electrical engineering, leading to significant technological innovations
Electrical engineering paved the way for the invention of the telegraph, a major advancement in telecommunications
Electrical engineering contributed to the development of the telephone, enhancing global communication
Electrical engineering advancements facilitated the creation of the internet, revolutionizing global connectivity
Advancements in electrical engineering have enabled the development of electric cars, promoting sustainable transportation
Electrical engineering has contributed to the electrification of trains, aiding in the reduction of greenhouse gas emissions
The field of electrical engineering has been crucial in the invention and development of computers
